sections.visibleHint: These entries are shown to visitors on the public projects page.

createModal.triggerHint: Choose an empty project or start from an existing one.
createModal.title: Create project
createModal.descriptionSelectSource: Choose how you want to start creating this project.
createModal.descriptionSelectExisting: Select a project from the system to start from.

empty.title: Start empty
empty.description: Open a blank project form and add details manually.

existing.title: Use existing project
existing.description: Pick one project from the system, then continue to a blank form for now.
existing.emptyDescription: There are no existing projects available in the system yet.

createPage.title: Create public project
createPage.description: Add a bilingual listing for the public website: URL slug, gallery, location, pricing, and optional link to an internal project.
createPage.formDescription: Fill in the fields below. The slug must be unique and use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

editPage.title: Edit public project
editPage.description: Update the bilingual listing for the public website.
editPage.formDescription: Update the fields below. The slug must be unique and use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

seoPage.title: Project SEO
seoPage.description: Manage search engine optimization settings for this project.

placeholders.linkedProjectId: Paste internal project ID if linking
placeholders.shortDescription: One or two lines for cards and SEO
placeholders.description: Longer copy for the project page

ui.slugHint: Used in the public URL. At least 3 characters. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
ui.isActiveHint: Turn off to save as draft (hidden) if your site checks this flag.
ui.isFeaturedHint: Show this project on the homepage. Maximum 2 projects can be featured.
ui.isFeaturedLimitReached: 2 projects are already featured. Unfeature one from the projects list to enable this.
ui.projectGuideHint: Upload a PDF file as the project guide. Only one file allowed.
ui.linkedProjectHint: Optional link to an internal project. When you start from an existing project, fields are filled automatically. Use the Load from project button to import data from any ID.
ui.galleryHint: Add at least 5 images for the public gallery. You can remove any image before saving.
ui.attachmentsHint: PDFs, images, and other files (same uploader as internal projects).
ui.attachmentsUploadMoreHint: Upload additional files. These are stored together with any linked project files you keep selected above.
ui.linkedProjectFilesSection: Files from the linked internal project
ui.linkedProjectFilesHint: Select which existing files to include on the public listing. You can still upload new files below.
ui.noImages: No images yet. Upload using the area above.
ui.badgesHint: Add optional badges with Arabic and English labels and a color.
ui.featuresHint: Add rows with bilingual labels and values, and upload an icon image for each.
ui.noBadges: No badges yet. Create badge records first, or leave empty.
ui.noFeatures: No features yet. Create feature records first, or leave empty.
ui.noBadgesAdded: No badges yet. Use Add to create one.
ui.noFeaturesAdded: No features yet. Use Add to create one.
ui.featureIconHint: Upload a small PNG or SVG. The public URL is saved with this feature.

actions.submitHint: Creates the public project and returns you to the website projects list.

errors.slugMinLength: Slug must be at least 3 characters

errors.imagesMinFive: Add at least 5 images to the gallery

contact.title: Contact Page
contact.description: Manage the contact page hero text, sidebar copy, and shared contact channels.

heroInfoSection.title: Hero & contact sidebar
heroInfoSection.description: Top hero lines (no background image), sidebar intro, channels heading, phone, email, and social links.

ui.sharedContactHint: Phone and email are stored once and shown for both languages.
ui.bilingualHint: Hero and sidebar text can differ per language; contact details are shared.

settings.pageDescription: Brand colors, typography, logos, SEO defaults, and public contact details for your marketing site. Load them on the live site via the public API.

theme.title: Theme & colors
theme.description: Brand palette for the public site (hex values).

fonts.title: Typography
fonts.description: Font family names for Arabic and English on the public site (Google Fonts names or a full CSS stack with commas).
fonts.hint: Single names load via Google Fonts (weights 300–700). Use commas for stacks, e.g. system-ui, sans-serif.

logos.title: Logos
logos.description: Two variants so the mark stays legible on light and dark backgrounds.
logos.forDarkBgHint: Usually a light or white version for navbars and footers on dark UI.
logos.forLightBgHint: Usually a dark version for headers on white or light sections.

seo.title: SEO & metadata
seo.description: Defaults for meta tags and social sharing. Page-specific content can still override these.
seo.siteUrlHint: Canonical base URL (https) used for Open Graph and links.
seo.ogImageHint: Shown when links are shared. Around 1200×630 px works well for most platforms.
seo.twitterSiteHint: Site username for Twitter card attribution, e.g. @yourbrand.
seo.robotsAllowIndex: Allow search engines to index the site
seo.robotsHint: Turn off only for staging or pre-launch environments.
seo.faviconHint: Square image, ideally .ico or .png. Shown in browser tabs and bookmarks.

contact.title: Contact & analytics
contact.description: Public-facing contact details and measurement ID for your public frontend.
contact.emailHint: May be shown in the footer or structured data.
contact.gaHint: Example: G-XXXXXXXXXX. Returned by the public API for your site to initialize analytics.

social.title: Social media
social.description: Links to your social media profiles. Displayed in the public site footer and returned by the public API.

footer.title: Footer
footer.description: Footer description text shown at the bottom of the public site.

pageSeo.title: Page SEO & metadata
pageSeo.description: Configure page-level SEO fields. Empty optional values will fallback to Website Settings defaults.
pageSeo.robotsHint: Use this page-level indexing flag when you need to override general site behavior.

errors.metaTitleMax: Meta title must be at most 200 characters.
errors.metaDescriptionMax: Meta description must be at most 500 characters.
errors.twitterHandleMax: X (Twitter) handle must be at most 100 characters.
errors.keywordsMax: Keywords must be at most 500 characters.
